Made with Jekyll

Christmas Eve

Published on 24 . 12 . 2015 • Manly-beach

I deciced to focus on the seagulls this morning as the waves were small and mushy. One more sleep until Christmas, this year has gone by fast. There is going to be a Camel Parade today on the Corso in front of St Matthew’s Anglican Church at 2:30pm so I might go down and take some more photos this afternoon. Any hoo, Merry Christmas everyone and a Happy New Year! In the mean time enjoy these photos I’ve selected for today’s post.

Polychromos Magenta

May you soar like an eagle and make your nest among the stars

Pensive and Determined

Peaking over the horizon

Power Sloshin’

Queenscliff Waterfall in full swing

Read full post →

Holidays

Published on 21 . 12 . 2015 • Manly-beach

Today is officially the first day of the Christmas holidays for me. I set my alarm last night for 5:30am and I managed to get up this morning, so I grabbed my camera and headed down for the sunrise. It’s nice and warm this morning at 24 degrees apparently going to rain later this afternoon. And for all the nerds out there that might be interested, as of last night I have converted this site over to a Jekyll blog hosted on Github pages, which means fast free hosting with version control. Feel free to check out my git repo for this site and raise a pull request ; )

Fire and Flames

Purple Nurple

You probably can’t tell from this photo but I have mongy pinky toes…

Plenty of surfers out already

Kayak Sunrise

Read full post →

Manly Beach Sydney Storm Aftermath

Published on 23 . 04 . 2015 • Manly-beach

NSW was smashed by a huge storm this week with torrential rain and strong winds. I went down to the beach to take some photos and videos of the aftermath.

Local news reporting on the storm.

People coming to check out the damage

Surfers taking advantage of the waves whipped up by the storm.

No thanks

There used to be a sand bank there until the lagoon overflowed and washed all the sand out to sea.

Try not to swallow any of that water

Read full post →

Manly Beach Summer Surf

Published on 07 . 01 . 2015 • Manly-beach

Read full post →

Gabriel

Published on 09 . 12 . 2014 • Manly-beach

For some reason I was awake this morning and I noticed a golden glow coming through the window so I grabbed my camera and raced to the roof to take some photos. There was also a double rainbow over the Manly Cricket Oval and I also received a phone call later that morning to find out my nephew had been born, what a day! So I dedicate these photos to my nephew Gabriel.

A new day and a new life is born

Golden Sets

Double Rainbow

Read full post →
